title: Laurens Winkelhagen
text: Home * People * Laurens Winkelhagen Laurens Winkelhagen [1] Laurens Winkelhagen , a Dutch computer scientist and senior software engineer. He holds a M.Sc. in artificial intelligence from Utrecht University in 2006. As computer chess programmer, Laurens Winkelhagen is author of the chess engines JanWillem , released in 2004, and FrankWalter , first released in 2009 [2] , revised in 2018 [3] , and published as open source in February 2019 [4] .
